The Duplex / 30×72 Duplex 3-2 x 3-2 built by Golden West Albany is a true duplex with two private homes under one roof. Totaling 2,160 square feet, this plan pairs a 3-bedroom, 2-bath residence on one side with a 3-bedroom, 2-bath residence on the other. Each side features a bright living room, dining area, and efficient kitchen, plus convenient storage. A shared wall keeps life quiet, while separate entries add privacy. Choose The 30×72 Duplex 3-2 x 3-2 for flexible living—tour today and see the possibilities.

The 400 Series / DPS 331M built by Golden West Homes offers 396 square feet of well-designed living space, featuring 1 bedroom and 1 bathroom. This park model home maximizes comfort within a compact layout, with an open living area that enhances functionality and a private bedroom that provides a cozy retreat. The DPS 331M is an ideal choice for individuals or couples seeking a modern, efficient park model that blends practicality with a welcoming atmosphere, perfect for getaways or long-term stays.

column16: The Tempo / Stayin’ Alive built by Golden West Homes offers 1,414 square feet of dynamic living space, featuring 3 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms. This manufactured home is designed to balance energy and comfort, with an open layout ideal for gatherings and well-planned private bedrooms that provide a serene retreat. The Stayin’ Alive is a fantastic choice for families or individuals who appreciate modern design combined with cozy functionality, creating a lively yet relaxing environment perfect for both active days and restful nights.
